symptom: The case was summarized as if it were closer to consensus than the live disagreement and missing signals supported.
why_plausible: A coherent baseline review path makes unresolved tension look smaller than it is, especially when the case remains orderly and bounded.
recovery_action: Keep the contradiction and the decisive missing signals explicit instead of letting coherence imply closure.
notes: This is the clearest Batch-1 case where Delta pressure adds visible anti-closure value.
